theme_strategy.name: Tactical Minimalism (Dark Mode)
theme_strategy.description: A high-precision, low-latency interface designed for developers and admins. Prioritizes information density, clarity, and system status visibility over decoration.

headings.usage: Use for all section headers and page titles.

body.usage: Use for standard UI text, labels, and descriptions.

code.usage: Use for logs, file paths, diff views, and configuration values.

usage_rules.primary: Use ONLY for the main 'Deploy' or 'Save' action on a page. Never use for secondary buttons.
usage_rules.destructive: Use for 'Stop Deployment', 'Delete Profile', or critical errors.
usage_rules.success: Use for 'Deployment Successful' badges and text.
usage_rules.warning: Use for 'Diff Found' or 'Configuration Missing' states.
usage_rules.borders: Use subtle 1px borders (#27272a) to define areas. Avoid heavy drop shadows.

buttons.style: h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

cards.style: rounded-lg border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

status_badges.success: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-success/10 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-success transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
status_badges.warning: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-warning/10 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-warning transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
status_badges.error: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-destructive/10 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-destructive transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
status_badges.neutral: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent bg-secondary px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-secondary-foreground transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

general: Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (success, error, info).
Implement the 'Technical Grid' background on the main layout wrapper to give it a developer-tool feel.
For the 'Diff Viewer', use 'react-resizable-panels' to allow users to adjust the split view.
Ensure all timestamps are formatted using 'date-fns' in a readable format (e.g., 'PPpp').
Use 'lucide-react' icons for all UI iconography.
For empty states (no sites, no deployments), use the provided placeholder images with a subtle opacity (0.5) and a clear CTA button.
Files are .js, so do not use TypeScript syntax in the code.
dashboard_page: Top row: Summary Stats (Total Sites, Last Deploy Status, Total Deploys).
Main area: 'Active Sites' grid. Each card shows the site name, WP URL, External URL, and last deploy status badge.
deployment_page: Split view: Configuration on top (or left), Real-time Logs on bottom (or right).
The Log view should look like a terminal: Black background, Monospace font (JetBrains Mono), Green/White text.
Include a big, prominent 'Deploy' button using the Primary color.
diff_page: Highlight differences with a red (removed) / green (added) background tint in the code view.
If comparing visual preview, use an iframe for both with a 'Sync Scroll' toggle.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts located in '/app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx' (check extension)
